items.name: InsertTextCommand
items.doc: Insert text at a byte offset in the serialized Markdown.

items.name: DeleteRangeCommand
items.doc: Delete a byte range from the serialized Markdown.

items.name: new
items.signature: pub fn new(start: usize, end: usize) -> Self
items.doc: Create a new delete range command.

items.name: ReplaceRangeCommand
items.doc: Replace a byte range in the serialized Markdown.

items.name: new
items.signature: pub fn new(start: usize, end: usize, replacement: String) -> Self
items.doc: Create a new replace range command.

items.name: InsertBlockCommand
items.doc: Insert a block at a specific index in the document.
